pkgmetadata.longdescription: python-json-patchPyPI version Supported Python versions Build Status CoverageStatusApplying JSON Patches in Python-------------------------------Library to apply JSON Patches according to RFC6902 httptools.ietf.orghtmlrfc6902__See source code for examples- Website httpsgithub.comstefankoeglpython-json-patch- Repository httpsgithub.comstefankoeglpython-json-patch.git- Documentation httpspython-json-patch.readthedocs.org- PyPI httpspypi.python.orgpypijsonpatch- Travis CI httpstravis-ci.orgstefankoeglpython-json-patch- Coveralls httpscoveralls.iorstefankoeglpython-json-patchRunning external tests----------------------To run external tests (such as those fromhttpsgithub.comjson-patchjson-patch-tests) use ext_test.py .ext_tests.py ..json-patch-teststests.json..
